body: Dave, just thinking about you mentioning that slow leak on lift 2 last week. Did the fitting ever come in from Northern Tool or did you end up sourcing it somewhere else? That thing's been a headache since February. Let me know if you want me to swing by Tuesday morning before your first bay opens - I've still got the old Snap-on flare kit in the garage if you need it. - Dad
snippet: Dave, just thinking about you mentioning that slow leak on lift 2 last week. Did...
subject: Lift 2 hydraulic line - did you ever get that fitting?

body:
The fitting finally showed up Monday with the rest of the parts delivery. Ran the line yesterday after close - no drips so far, which I'm calling a win. Hold onto that flare kit though, the 3/8 adapter on lift 1 is starting to weep a little so I may be calling in a favor sooner than later.

Tuesday's packed but I should have a window around 9 before the Silverado comes in. Coffee's on me if you make it out.
snippet: The fitting finally showed up Monday with the rest of the parts delivery. Ran th...
subject: Re: Lift 2 hydraulic line - did you ever get that fitting?

body:
David,

Haven't seen you since the cookout. Your mother keeps asking when you're coming by for dinner - I keep telling her you're busy but she doesn't want to hear it.

Any chance you've got a window this week? I was thinking maybe I swing by the shop one morning, or we grab lunch somewhere. Up to you. I'm retired, remember - my schedule is whatever yours isn't.

Dad
snippet:
David,

Haven't seen you since the cookout. Your mother keeps asking when you're...
subject: Catching up this week?

body:
Dad,

Tell Mom I haven't forgotten about dinner, I'm just waiting until I have a full Saturday free - which hasn't happened yet but will eventually.

This week's tight. Got a parts delivery Thursday I need to be here for, and I've got Eagles practice Friday by 5 so I can't run long. Wednesday morning might actually work though. I do a coffee run to Seven Oaks around 7:30 before the bays get going - you could meet me there, grab a coffee, take a walk if the weather holds. Nothing fancy but it'd be good to catch up.

Let me know.

David
snippet:
Dad,

Tell Mom I haven't forgotten about dinner, I'm just waiting until I have a...
subject: Re: Catching up this week?

body:
Wednesday at 7:30 works fine. Seven Oaks it is - I think I've driven past that place a hundred times and never stopped in. Your uncle Frank used to get coffee near there somewhere.

I'll leave the house by 7 so I'm not late. Your mother says hi and also says if you don't come for dinner soon she's driving to the shop herself. Consider yourself warned.

See you Wednesday.

Dad
snippet: Wednesday at 7:30 works fine. Seven Oaks it is - I think I've driven past that p...
subject: Re: Catching up this week?

body:
David, your mother wants to do a proper sit-down dinner this week before Frank and Diane head back to Toledo. They're only here through Thursday. Emily's coming Wednesday night, so that seems like the natural choice, but I wanted to check with you first since I know your week fills up fast.

Let me know if Wednesday works or if we need to shift it. Your mother will want to know by tonight so she can plan.
snippet: David, your mother wants to do a proper sit-down dinner this week before Frank a...
subject: Dinner at the house this week

body:
Wednesday works. I've got Eagles practice at Hemlock Park - need to be there by 4, should be done by 6 at the latest. I can head straight over from the park if you're okay eating around 6:30.

I've got a parts delivery coming in Tuesday morning so that day's shot anyway. Wednesday's cleaner. Tell Mom I'll grab a pie from Sievert's on the way, unless she'd rather I didn't.
snippet: Wednesday works. I've got Eagles practice at Hemlock Park - need to be there by ...
subject: Re: Dinner at the house this week

body:
6:30 is fine, we'll hold dinner. And yes, bring the pie - your mother will say don't bother and then be glad you did.

Frank mentioned his Silverado has been hesitating on cold starts. I told him not to corner you at dinner but you know how that goes. Just a heads up so it doesn't blindside you between the salad and the main course.
snippet: 6:30 is fine, we'll hold dinner. And yes, bring the pie - your mother will say d...
subject: Re: Dinner at the house this week

body:
Appreciated. I'll mentally pencil in ten minutes after dessert for the Silverado diagnosis. Could be the throttle body, could be he's running cheap fuel - either way it's a five-minute conversation.

See you Wednesday. Tell Mom cherry pie.
snippet: Appreciated. I'll mentally pencil in ten minutes after dessert for the Silverado...
subject: Re: Dinner at the house this week

body:
David, your mother's doing ribs on the grill Sunday afternoon. Planning to eat around 2. Frank and Diane are coming, Kevin too if he can get off work. Your sister said she's in.

Let me know if you're bringing anything or if you need me to pick something up for you. Don't say chips.
snippet: David, your mother's doing ribs on the grill Sunday afternoon. Planning to eat a...
subject: Sunday - cookout here

body:
I'll be there. Can do 2, easy. I'll grab a case of Modelo and some limes - don't let Kevin claim he brought the drinks again.

One thing: I have to leave by 4:15 latest. Eagles practice at Hemlock at 5 and I've got the equipment bag. But I'll be there for the ribs, which is the whole point.

Is your truck still making that knock on cold start? Bring it around front when I get there and I'll take a look before we eat.
snippet: I'll be there. Can do 2, easy. I'll grab a case of Modelo and some limes - don't...
subject: Re: Sunday - cookout here

body:
Truck's been doing it every morning this week. Thought it cleared up but it's back. I'll have it out front.

Kin said he'd make it. Your aunt's bringing potato salad so we're covered on sides. Your mother already told me not to touch the grill until noon so we're going to have a long morning. Come early if you want coffee.
snippet: Truck's been doing it every morning this week. Thought it cleared up but it's ba...
subject: Re: Sunday - cookout here

body:
I'll come by around noon then. Let the truck warm up for five minutes before I get there - I want to hear it cold, not after it's been running.

If it's what I think it is it's probably just the VVT solenoid. Twenty-minute fix. I'll have the tools in the truck.

Tell Mom I said happy early the weekend.
snippet: I'll come by around noon then. Let the truck warm up for five minutes before I g...
subject: Re: Sunday - cookout here

body:
She's going to pretend that doesn't make sense and then tell everyone you said it. I'll have the truck cold.

See you Sunday. Drive safe.
snippet: She's going to pretend that doesn't make sense and then tell everyone you said i...
subject: Re: Sunday - cookout here

body: Dave, I've got an errand out near the Romulus distributor Wednesday anyway - the AC Delco place on Wick Road. If you've got anything on order there I can grab it and drop it off before noon, save you the delivery wait. Just let me know the order number and I'll swing in. Your mom wants to know if you're still coming Sunday.
snippet: Dave, I've got an errand out near the Romulus distributor Wednesday anyway - the...
subject: Parts pickup Wednesday morning

body:
That actually works out perfectly. Order number is ACD-884712, should be two boxes - a water pump and a belt tensioner kit for a '19 Silverado that's been sitting in Bay 2 longer than I'd like. Counter guy's name is Terry, he knows the account. I need it before noon anyway so the timing lines up.

Tell Mom yes, I'll be there Sunday. Bringing the Eagles equipment bag with me so don't let her park in the driveway.
snippet: That actually works out perfectly. Order number is ACD-884712, should be two box...
subject: Re: Parts pickup Wednesday morning

body:
David,

Got the carb rebuild kit in from Rock Auto yesterday. Been sitting on the workbench all week giving me the eye. You free Saturday morning? I figure we knock out the carb, maybe get to the fuel lines if we're moving. Your uncle Frank might swing by around noon but he'll mostly just drink my coffee and point.

Let me know what time works. I'll have the shop open by 8.

- Dad
snippet:
David,

Got the carb rebuild kit in from Rock Auto yesterday. Been sitting on th...
subject: Saturday - the Bronco

body:
Saturday works. I've got Eagles practice at Hemlock at 5 so I need to be out by 4 at the latest, but 8 to 4 is a solid window - more than enough for the carb and fuel lines if we don't get distracted arguing about the throttle linkage again.

I'll bring the parts cleaner, mine's better than yours. Tell Frank he can point all he wants as long as he hands tools when asked.

See you at 8.

David
snippet: Saturday works. I've got Eagles practice at Hemlock at 5 so I need to be out by ...
subject: Re: Saturday - the Bronco

body:
4 o'clock is fine, we'll be done well before that. And your parts cleaner is not better than mine, but bring it anyway.

I'll have coffee on. Your mother wants to know if you're staying for lunch - just say yes, it's easier.

- Dad
snippet: 4 o'clock is fine, we'll be done well before that. And your parts cleaner is not...
subject: Re: Saturday - the Bronco
